001package entityClasses;
002
003/*******
004 * <p> Title: User Class </p>
005 * 
006 * <p> Description: This User class represents a user entity in the system.  It contains the user's
007 *  details such as userName, password, and roles being played. </p>
008 * 
009 * <p> Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025 </p>
010 * 
011 * @author Lynn Robert Carter
012 * 
013 * 
014 */ 
015
016public class User {
017        
018        /*
019         * These are the private attributes for this entity object
020         */
021    private String userName;
022    private String password;
023    private String firstName;
024    private String middleName;
025    private String lastName;
026    private String preferredFirstName;
027    private String emailAddress;
028    private String phoneNumber;
029    private boolean adminRole;
030    private boolean studentRole;
031    private boolean staffRole;
032    
033    
034    /*****
035     * <p> Method: User() </p>
036     * 
037     * <p> Description: This default constructor is not used in this system. </p>
038     */
039    public User() {
040        
041    }
042
043    
044    /*****
045     * <p> Method: User(String userName, String password, boolean r1, boolean r2,
046     *          boolean r3, boolean r4, boolean r5) </p>
047     * 
048     * <p> Description: This constructor is used to establish user entity objects. </p>
049     * 
050     * @param userName specifies the account userName for this user
051     * 
052     * @param password specifies the account password for this user
053     * 
054     * @param r1 specifies the the Admin attribute (TRUE or FALSE) for this user
055     * 
056     * @param r2 specifies the the Student attribute (TRUE or FALSE) for this user
057     * 
058     * @param r3 specifies the the Staff attribute (TRUE or FALSE) for this user
059     * 
060     */
061    // Constructor to initialize a new User object with userName, password, and role.
062    public User(String userName, String password, String fn, String mn, String ln, String pfn, 
063                String ea, boolean r1, boolean r2, boolean r3) {
064        this.userName = userName;
065        this.password = password;
066        this.firstName = fn;
067        this.middleName = mn;
068        this.lastName = ln;
069        this.preferredFirstName = pfn;
070        this.emailAddress = ea;
071        this.phoneNumber = "";
072        this.adminRole = r1;
073        this.studentRole = r2;
074        this.staffRole = r3;
075    }
076
077    
078    /*****
079     * <p> Method: void setAdminRole(boolean role) </p>
080     * 
081     * <p> Description: This setter defines the Admin role attribute. </p>
082     * 
083     * @param role is a boolean that specifies if this user in playing the Admin role.
084     * 
085     */
086    // Sets the role of the Admin user.
087    public void setAdminRole(boolean role) {
088        this.adminRole=role;
089    }
090
091    
092    /*****
093     * <p> Method: void setStudentRole(boolean role) </p>
094     * 
095     * <p> Description: This setter defines the student role attribute. </p>
096     * 
097     * @param role is a boolean that specifies if this user is playing student role.
098     * 
099     */
100    // Sets the student role.
101    public void setStudentRole(boolean role) {
102        this.studentRole=role;
103    }
104
105    
106    /*****
107     * <p> Method: void setStaffRole(boolean role) </p>
108     * 
109     * <p> Description: This setter defines the staff role attribute. </p>
110     * 
111     * @param role is a boolean that specifies if this user is playing staff role.
112     * 
113     */
114    // Sets the staff role.
115    public void setStaffRole(boolean role) {
116        this.staffRole=role;
117    }
118
119    
120    /*****
121     * <p> Method: String getUserName() </p>
122     * 
123     * <p> Description: This getter returns the UserName. </p>
124     * 
125     * @return a String of the UserName
126     * 
127     */
128    // Gets the current value of the UserName.
129    public String getUserName() { return userName; }
130
131    
132    /*****
133     * <p> Method: String getPassword() </p>
134     * 
135     * <p> Description: This getter returns the Password. </p>
136     * 
137     * @return a String of the password
138         *
139     */
140    // Gets the current value of the Password.
141    public String getPassword() { return password; }
142
143    
144    /*****
145     * <p> Method: String getFirstName() </p>
146     * 
147     * <p> Description: This getter returns the FirstName. </p>
148     * 
149     * @return a String of the FirstName
150         *
151     */
152    // Gets the current value of the FirstName.
153    public String getFirstName() { return firstName; }
154
155    
156    /*****
157     * <p> Method: String getMiddleName() </p>
158     * 
159     * <p> Description: This getter returns the MiddleName. </p>
160     * 
161     * @return a String of the MiddleName
162         *
163     */
164    // Gets the current value of the Student role attribute.
165    public String getMiddleName() { return middleName; }
166
167    
168    /*****
169     * <p> Method: String getLasteName() </p>
170     * 
171     * <p> Description: This getter returns the LastName. </p>
172     * 
173     * @return a String of the LastName
174         *
175     */
176    // Gets the current value of the Student role attribute.
177    public String getLastName() { return lastName; }
178
179    
180    /*****
181     * <p> Method: String getPreferredFirstName() </p>
182     * 
183     * <p> Description: This getter returns the PreferredFirstName. </p>
184     * 
185     * @return a String of the PreferredFirstName
186         *
187     */
188    // Gets the current value of the Student role attribute.
189    public String getPreferredFirstName() { return preferredFirstName; }
190
191    
192    /*****
193     * <p> Method: String getEmailAddress() </p>
194     * 
195     * <p> Description: This getter returns the EmailAddress. </p>
196     * 
197     * @return a String of the EmailAddress
198         *
199     */
200    // Gets the current value of the Student role attribute.
201    public String getEmailAddress() { return emailAddress; }
202
203    /*****
204     * <p> Method: String getPhoneNumber() </p>
205     * 
206     * <p> Description: This getter returns the PhoneNumber. </p>
207     * 
208     * @return a String of the PhoneNumber
209         *
210     */
211    // Gets the current value of the PhoneNumber.
212    public String getPhoneNumber() { return phoneNumber; }
213
214    public void setUserName(String s) { userName = s; }
215    public void setPassword(String s) { password = s; }
216    public void setFirstName(String s) { firstName = s; }
217    public void setMiddleName(String s) { middleName = s; }
218    public void setLastName(String s) { lastName = s; }
219    public void setPreferredFirstName(String s) { preferredFirstName = s; }
220    public void setEmailAddress(String s) { emailAddress = s; }
221    public void setPhoneNumber(String s) { phoneNumber = s; }
222
223    
224    /*****
225     * <p> Method: String getAdminRole() </p>
226     * 
227     * <p> Description: This getter returns the value of the Admin role attribute. </p>
228     * 
229     * @return a String of "TRUE" or "FALSE" based on state of the attribute
230         *
231     */
232    // Gets the current value of the Admin role attribute.
233    public boolean getAdminRole() { return adminRole; }
234
235    
236    /*****
237     * <p> Method: boolean getStudentRole() </p>
238     * 
239     * <p> Description: This getter returns the value of the student role attribute. </p>
240     * 
241     * @return a boolean based on state of the attribute
242         *
243     */
244    // Gets the current value of the student role attribute.
245        public boolean getStudentRole() { return studentRole; }
246
247    
248    /*****
249     * <p> Method: boolean getStaffRole() </p>
250     * 
251     * <p> Description: This getter returns the value of the staff role attribute. </p>
252     * 
253     * @return a boolean based on state of the attribute
254         *
255     */
256    // Gets the current value of the staff role attribute.
257    public boolean getStaffRole() { return staffRole; }
258
259        
260    /*****
261     * <p> Method: int getNumRoles() </p>
262     * 
263     * <p> Description: This getter returns the number of roles this user plays (0 - 5). </p>
264     * 
265     * @return a value 0 - 5 of the number of roles this user plays
266         *
267     */
268    // Gets the current value of the Staff role attribute.
269    public int getNumRoles() {
270        int numRoles = 0;
271        if (adminRole) numRoles++;
272        if (studentRole) numRoles++;
273        if (staffRole) numRoles++;
274        return numRoles;
275    }
276}
